samples.lab_comments: ALL METALLIC DEBRIS REMOVED FROM THE FILTER SEEMS TO BE NORMAL ENGINE WEAR. ALL OIL VALUES SEEM FINE. WE WILL CONTINUE TO MONITOR THIS ENGINE WITH YOUR NEXT SAMPLE.

THE CHIPS SENT AS WELL AS A TRACE AMOUNT OF DEBRIS REMOVED FROM THE FILTER CONSISTS OF ALLOY STEEL, CLOSEST MATCH AMS# 6274, WITH THE LARGEST PIECE MEASURING 2342 X 2052 MICRONS. ALL OIL VALUES SEEM FINE. WE WILL CONTINUE TO MONITOR THIS ENGINE WITH YOUR NEXT SAMPLE. PLEASE CONTACT THE ENGINE MANUFACTURER'S SERVICE REP IF FURTHER ASSISTANCE IS NEEDED.
